series_metadata.series_description: All legal and financial documents, including but not limited to bond counsel’s legal opinion, the bond purchase agreement, final cash flows, and credit rating results associated with the offering of a new issuance of municipal securities.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for three years after bond has matured and then transfer to State Archives. If of no historical value to State Archives, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for three years after bond has matured and then transfer to State Archives. If of no historical value to State Archives, destroy., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Archives
